<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Resolve the text measurement adapter from block measurement options.

## Import

```ts
import { resolveTextAdapter } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function resolveTextAdapter(opts: MeasureBlockOptions): MeasurementAdapter
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `MeasureBlockOptions` | Block measurement options. |

## Returns

The selected text measurement adapter.

## Example

```ts
resolveTextAdapter({ adapter });
```

`packages/ts/src/solutions/reactive-layout/utils.ts`
